## Type

- [ ] Bounty submission or reservation
- [ ] Automation/code change
- [ ] Generated data update
- [ ] Documentation

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] One `submissions/*.json` file changed
- [ ] `contributor` matches PR author
- [ ] `wallet_address` is real, not placeholder
- [ ] `status` is one of `in-progress`, `awaiting-review`, `reviewed`, `paid`
- [ ] Completed claims use a GitHub PR URL in `work_link`
- [ ] Completed claims link merged upstream work
- [ ] Paid claims include `payment_tx_id` and `payment_date`

## Notes

Triage bot will label, comment, request review, and close invalid or stale submissions automatically.
